title: Melting Race
description: Four ice cubes race under different conditions while the child predicts, waits, observes, and calls the winner.
learningGoals: Connect heat with melting cause and effect
Predict an outcome before observing it
Wait patiently through short science check-ins
Compare ice cubes under different conditions
interactionModel: tap the large done step after each real-world setup or observation; timed check-ins build the suspense of the melting race
feedbackModel: sports-announcer science coaching with sparkle, tick, and tada SFX; every prediction is welcome and observation drives the result

modes.title: Ice Rescue
modes.skill: use warmth to melt ice and free a toy

credits: Kaigani; emoji placeholder art only (see ASSETS.md). Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
